title: cyclamen hederifolium subsp. africanum
intro: Cyclamen hederifolium subsp. africanum, also known as the African nettle-leaved cyclamen, is a plant species belonging to the cyclamen genus. It is a perennial plant with heart-shaped leaves that are often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cyclamen hederifolium subsp. africanum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a popular treatment for conditions such as arthritis and gout. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the extract in ointments and creams.
